name: USS Hank (DD 702)
events: 6 Dec 1944 USS Hank arrived at Pearl Harbor.
28 Dec 1944 USS Hank arrived at Ulithi.
30 Dec 1944 USS Hank departed from Ulithi with TF 38.
26 Jan 1945 USS Hank returns to Ulithi.
10 Feb 1945 USS Hank departed from Ulithi with TF 58.
4 Mar 1945 USS Hank returns to Ulithi.
14 Mar 1945 USS Hank departed from Ulithi again with TF 58.
11 Apr 1945 While supporting the Okinawa landings USS Hank is lightly damaged by a Japanese aircraft in position 27°00'N, 130°00'E. She returns to Ulithi to make repairs.
1 May 1945 With her repairs completed USS Hank rejoins TF 58 off Okinawa.
1 Jun 1945 USS Hank arrived at San Pedro Bay, Philippines.
1 Jul 1945 USS Hank departed from San Pedro Bay, Philippines with TF 38.
10 Sep 1945 USS Hank enters Tokyo Bay.
